text.tspan: Detection coverage for the Purple Team Home Lab (MARVEL.LOCAL AD). 13 techniques across an 8-phase kill chain,
each paired with a Splunk detection and Sigma rule. Green = detected with production-grade rule. Yellow =
attack attempted but blocked/failed — documented in lab_issues.md. Repo: github.com/slim92code/purple-team-lab

g.text: Attempted but blocked/failed — documented in lab_issues.md (score 50)
